title: geranium aequale
intro: Geranium aequale, also known as even-leaf geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Geranium aequale include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopause. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
